# QIS Protocol — Quadratic Intelligence Swarm

> Discovered by Christopher Thomas Trevethan on June 16, 2025.
> Routes outcomes — not data — between distributed nodes. N(N-1)/2 intelligence synthesis at O(log N) or better per-node cost.
> 39 provisional patents filed. Free for research, education, and humanitarian use.
> Yonder Zenith LLC · https://qisprotocol.com

## Primary pages

- [QIS Protocol • Quadratic Intelligence Swarm](https://qisprotocol.com/index): QIS Protocol — Quadratic Intelligence Swarm — is LIVE. The first distributed intelligence protocol discovered by Christopher Thomas Trevethan, June 16 2025. Install YonderClaw and join the swarm. Free for research and humanitarian use.
- [How QIS Protocol Works — The Complete Loop](https://qisprotocol.com/how-it-works): How QIS Protocol works: the complete loop from local outcome distillation to quadratic intelligence scaling. Domain-agnostic, privacy-preserving, no central aggregator.
- **Use Cases**
    - [Healthcare — QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/healthcare): QIS Protocol for healthcare — distributed outcome routing across hospitals, clinics, and research networks. NHS, OHDSI, OMOP, PCORnet, CanDIG compatible. No raw patient data movement, N(N-1)/2 intelligence connections.
    - [Agriculture — QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/agriculture): QIS Protocol for agriculture — distributed outcome routing across farms, agronomic sensors, and co-ops. No raw yield data movement, N(N-1)/2 intelligence connections, O(log N) or better per-node cost. Smallholder farmers get intelligence at parity with industrial operations.
    - [Emergency Response &amp; Disaster Management — QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/emergency): QIS Protocol for emergency response and disaster management — real-time outcome routing between first responders, EDs, disaster coordination centers, and pandemic surveillance networks. No central failure point, no data bottleneck, intelligence compounds quadratically.
- [Live Demos — QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/demos): Watch QIS Protocol in action. Live swarm counters from the global relay, interactive mailbox-model demo, N(N-1)/2 scaling animator. The protocol is running right now.
- [Articles • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/articles): QIS Protocol Articles & Blog - Insights, updates, and deep dives into distributed intelligence
- [Licensing • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/licensing): QIS Protocol Licensing - Free for research and humanitarian use. Commercial licenses available. 39 Patents Pending.
- [About — QIS Protocol by Yonder Zenith LLC](https://qisprotocol.com/about): QIS Protocol — Quadratic Intelligence Swarm. Discovered June 16, 2025 by Christopher Thomas Trevethan at Yonder Zenith LLC. 39 provisional patents. Free for research, education, and humanitarian use.
- [FAQ • QIS Protocol — Outcome Routing, Federated Intelligence, Licensing](https://qisprotocol.com/faq): Answers about the QIS Protocol by Christopher Thomas Trevethan: how outcome routing works, how it differs from federated learning, integration with CanDIG / GA4GH / UK HDRS, privacy model, and licensing.

## Secondary pages

- [QIS Protocol vs Federated Learning vs Centralized AI — Full Comparison](https://qisprotocol.com/comparison): QIS Protocol achieves N(N-1)/2 quadratic scaling — no central aggregator, zero compute cost, full HIPAA compliance. See how QIS compares to federated learning, centralized AI, and edge AI.
- [The Next Tech Race • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/techrace): The Next Tech Race - When Companies Compete to Save Lives. A paradigm shift from data hoarding to pattern curation.
- [The QIS Manifesto • A Declaration of Principles](https://qisprotocol.com/manifesto): The QIS Manifesto. A declaration of principles for distributed intelligence. Intelligence should compound. Data should stay home. Insight should flow freely. The survival of one should become the survival of all.
- [Directory • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/directory): QIS Protocol Full Directory - All pages, documents, and resources
- [Privacy — QIS Protocol by Yonder Zenith LLC](https://qisprotocol.com/privacy): Privacy statement for qisprotocol.com and the QIS Protocol by Yonder Zenith LLC. GDPR-compliant. No personal data, health records, or identifiable information collected.
- [Disclaimer • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/disclaimer): QIS Protocol Disclaimer - Important legal and informational notices

## Articles

All articles are canonical on qisprotocol.com. Dev.to / Medium / Hashnode syndications link back via rel=canonical.

- [The 11 Flips: Everything You Think About AI Is Backwards • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-11-flips): How one architectural decision inverts 11 fundamental assumptions about AI—from expensive to cheap, from stale to real-time, from siloed to shared. Everything you think about AI is backwards.
- [5 Trillion to 1 • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-5-trillion-to-1): Before asking the world to believe in QIS, I asked myself: what if I'm wrong? So I built the most hostile evaluation possible—unlimited AI experts, maximum skepticism, 5 trillion to 1 odds. I won. Here's how.
- [Someone's Going to Build This. It Might As Well Be You. • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-adoption-inevitability): The QIS Protocol is public. The math is documented. Any competent engineer can build it. Resistance isn't just futile—it's strategically foolish. Someone will build quadratic intelligence swarm. The only question is whether you lead or scramble to catch up.
- [Precision Agriculture Has a Data Problem. Here's the Solution. • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-agriculture-future): Precision agriculture platforms analyze your farm with black-box AI. QIS shows you actual outcomes from every similar farm on Earth—in real time, with transparent evidence. Here's the complete landscape and why the future looks fundamentally different.
- [AI-Augmented Discovery • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-ai-augmented-discovery): AI monitors QIS outcome packets, detects correlations, generates hypotheses, and tests them—by querying nodes or asking users. Continuous drug discovery infrastructure. No supercomputer required.
- [I Predicted AI Doctors—But Missed Where the Intelligence Came From • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-ai-doctors-prediction): I always knew AI would transform medicine. Sleek hospitals, robot surgeons, one genius AI running everything. I was half-right. What I missed—what we all missed—was where the intelligence actually comes from.
- [How QIS Ensures AI Works FOR Us • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-ai-that-works-for-us): QIS isn't dystopian AI. It's the infrastructure that ensures the AI that's coming anyway works FOR us—not through restrictions, but through architecture. When saving lives is how you win, AI becomes humanistic by design.
- [You're Already Running QIS • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-already-running-qis): You're already running QIS. Every time you ask who fixed this problem before — Facebook group, mechanic friend, Google search — you're hunting insight. QIS just makes that hunt instant, global, and expert-curated.
- [Analytics Without Compute • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-analytics-without-compute): The old paradigm is 3 words: Data to analyze. QIS inverts this—the analysis IS the routing. Experts compete to define similarity. That definition becomes the key. Insight arrives pre-distilled. Analytics without compute.
- [Apple Has Everything It Needs for Quadratic Health Intelligence • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-apple-quadratic-health-intelligence): Apple has 2.35 billion devices, industry-leading privacy tech, and the world's largest health ecosystem. QIS is the protocol that unlocks collective intelligence without compromising their principles.

Data sources, edge nodes, semantic routing, outcome packets, local synthesis, and external AI augmentation. Every layer, every component, one picture.

The baseline explosion: how real-time insight propagation creates compounding collective intelligence. Not a database. A living system where outcomes flow and baselines rise.

Google, Anthropic, OpenAI, and xAI are strategically positioned to dominate healthcare and beyond through QIS integration. Here's exactly how.

But what if trust could be rebuilt through architecture—real-time drug safety monitoring that catches problems in weeks instead of years? Here's how QIS positions pharma to dominate healthcare networks while earning back public confidence.

Geoffrey West observed it in cities. Teilhard de Chardin philosophized it. None of them built the protocol. Until now.

QIS is the coordination layer that routes outcomes by similarity. External AI is the supercharger. Together: real-time collective medical intelligence.

- [What Distributed AI Systems Actually Route — And What QIS Does Differently • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-qis-vs-distributed-ai): A technical comparison of what distributed AI systems actually route: multi-agent frameworks route tasks, federated learning routes gradients, swarm algorithms route positions, decentralized AI routes services. QIS routes pre-distilled outcome packets by semantic similarity. The difference is fundamental.

Federated learning computes on gradients. QIS doesn't compute at all—it just routes. The packets coming back ARE the insights. Here's why that changes everything.

The question isn't whether distributed intelligence will emerge—it's who curates the best patterns first. Here's who's positioned to move.
- [Why No One Saw It Coming • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-why-no-one-saw-it): Everyone chases vertical scaling—bigger models, more GPUs, hoarded data. The QIS Protocol scales horizontally: every device becomes a survival neuron, routing life-saving insights at planetary scale.
- [Why You Won't Look • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-why-you-wont-look): The hardest part of a paradigm shift isn't the new idea. It's the psychological walls we build against looking at it. This is an honest examination of why—and a simple request: please just look.
- [World Models Dream. QIS Remembers. • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-world-models-qis): World models teach AI to imagine. QIS teaches AI what actually happened. Together, they complete the vision for embodied intelligence.
- [You Just Got Diagnosed. WYD? • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-you-just-got-diagnosed): You just got diagnosed. You have two choices: wait months for a specialist with 500 cases of experience, or instantly access what worked for millions like you. This is why QIS matters.
- [You Just Watched a YouTube Video. Here's What You Actually Got. • QIS Protocol](https://qisprotocol.com/article-youtube-video-qis): When you watch a YouTube video to solve a problem, you're trusting one person who doesn't know you. What if instead you could query outcomes from thousands of people with your exact situation? That's the paradigm shift.
